name: Ali Nasiripour
summary: Network Support Analyst and Infrastructure professional with 5 years of experience maintaining LAN/WAN environments, performing data backup and disaster recovery operations, and implementing network security procedures across multi-site enterprise environments. Proficient in network troubleshooting, Windows Server administration, firewall management, and Veeam-based backup architecture. Proven record of reducing recurring incidents, improving mean time to resolution, and supporting hybrid cloud environments. Committed to accuracy, client-focused service, and thorough technical documentation.
skills: Backup & Disaster Recovery (Veeam VBR, Veeam ONE)
Windows Server / Active Directory / DNS / DHCP / GPO

experience.title: Disaster Recovery / Backup Engineer
bullets: Perform enterprise backup and disaster recovery operations across 50+ locations, protecting 200+ physical and virtual servers across on-premises and cloud environments.
Administer full Veeam ecosystem (VBR, Veeam ONE, Enterprise Manager, Orchestrator) for multi-terabyte workload protection across VMware, Hyper-V, and Scale Computing platforms.
Conduct scheduled backup validation, automated DR reporting, and regular test restores to ensure recovery time and recovery point objectives are consistently met.
Administer Cisco Meraki network infrastructure (MX/MS/MR) across 50+ hotel and resort properties including firmware rollouts, VLAN segmentation, and Meraki Dashboard monitoring.
Implement and maintain network security procedures including firewall policy reviews, VPN management, RADIUS authentication, and Sophos firewall hardening.
Design and maintain centralized syslog architecture aggregating logs from firewalls, switches, and servers to improve network visibility and incident response.
Administer Windows Server, Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and Group Policy across multi-site environments.
Develop SOPs and disaster recovery documentation to strengthen operational resilience and knowledge transfer.

experience.title: Network Analyst
bullets: Monitored and managed LAN/WAN, VPN, and firewall activity to maintain high-availability environments across mountain resorts and hotel properties.
Led full network modernization project at Grouse Mountain Resort, replacing end-of-life switches, Sophos firewalls, servers, and wireless infrastructure.
Performed data backup operations and contributed to disaster recovery readiness and infrastructure reliability across all supported sites.
Implemented RADIUS authentication to enhance access control and strengthen on-premises security posture.
Administered Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, and Group Policy across multi-site Windows Server environments, maintaining consistent standards.
Troubleshot routing, VLAN, and connectivity issues, reducing recurring incidents and improving mean time to resolution.
Automated operational tasks using PowerShell to reduce manual overhead and improve efficiency.
Provided technical support across all supported locations including troubleshooting of servers, network hardware, and end-user systems.

experience.title: IT Network Administrator
bullets: Supported Windows Server environments, network hardware, and firewall infrastructure; managed system patching, OS updates, and virtualization environments.
Maintained hybrid backup environments and contributed to disaster recovery readiness and infrastructure reliability.

experience.title: Customer Support
bullets: Delivered technical support in a high-volume call centre; diagnosed connectivity and device issues with strong focus on communication and client satisfaction.
